# Chapter 1: Cells: structure and function  (~90 pp)
- 1.1 The cell as engineered object (12) · 1.2 Membranes, organelles, cytoskeleton (15) · 1.3 Prokaryotic vs eukaryotic (10) · 1.4 The cell as control loop (12) · 1.5 Worked examples: red blood cell, neuron, plant cell, bacterium (18) · 1.6 Failure section: how cells die (apoptosis, necrosis, senescence) (15) · 1.7 Cross-domain analogy: cell membrane as engineered interface (8)

**Archetype**: interface, control. **Project**: examine three household microorganism samples; document structures observed. **Exercises**: 25.
